snippet.title: GTA 6 : ROCKSTAR NOUS ENVOIE UN MESSAGE (Trailer 3, gameplay, map et +)
snippet.description:
Pense à t'abonner et à mettre un 👍 (si c'est pas déjà fait)

🔥Le braquage du Kortz Center vient d'arriver sur GTA Online, et Rockstar a glissé une quantité impressionnante de clins d'œil à GTA 6 ! 

Nouvelle mécanique de crochetage qu'on retrouvera dans GTA 6, tableau façon Red Dead planqué dans le DLC, le message de Michael De Santa à la fin du braquage, le tableau "Trust" qui fait directement référence à Lucia et Jason, la carte de Leonida, le nouveau recrutement anti-triche chez Rockstar, et un point sur le calendrier qui pourrait annoncer l'arrivée prochaine du Trailer 3. 

⏱️ Chapitres :

00:00 Intro
00:14 Le marketing continue
00:46 Mécaniques de jeu

snippet.description:

En combat principal, le champion des poids mi-moyens, Islam Makhachev, défendra son titre contre le premier aspirant, “The Future” Ian Machado Garry, dans le cadre d’un affrontement qui s’annonce électrisant.

En combat coprincipal, Mackenzie Dern défendra pour la première fois son titre des poids paille féminins face à la redoutable finisseuse, Gillian “The Savage” Robertson.

snippet.title: Naâman - Coco Wata (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Stream « Coco Wata » by Naâman : https://idol-io.ffm.to/cocowata

COCO WATA was born in one of the most beautiful way : in a moment of sharing.
During a jam session with his band and his wife Karishma, Naâman picked up his guitar and let the music flow. Little by little, a melody was born, carried by his deep love for life, nature, and the people around him. Together, they shaped this warm and uplifting song. To finish it, Naâman chose to add a verse that he had written ages ago as a young reggae lover in Jamaica. Years later, Coco Wata still flows like a river—an invitation to slow down, embrace the beauty of the present moment, and sing together. The video brings this journey to life through a blend of studio footage and rare archive images from the early days of Naâman’s musical journey, taking us back to where it all began.

Two-time GRAMMY®-nominated global girl group KATSEYE is coming to cinemas worldwide with a special theatrical release ahead of their third EP, WILD.

KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS is a captivating journey into the group's bold new era while celebrating the fans who helped make it possible. Featuring never-before-seen footage, EYEKONS fan videos, and intimate interviews from the group members, the film explores the powerful bond between KATSEYE and their global fandom. A love letter to the EYEKONS who helped build this movement, KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS reveals why this group's story is only just beginning.

From the intense pressure of Dream Academy to chart-topping viral success, audiences experience the highs, setbacks, sacrifices, and breakthrough moments that transformed KATSEYE on their path to global pop stardom. Praised by outlets including The New York Times, Vogue, Rolling Stone, and Billboard, KATSEYE has earned acclaim for their relentless dedication to their craft and electrifying live performances. As one of pop's most exciting emerging global acts, the group continues to solidify its place as a worldwide force.

From the same team that created Netflix’s POP STAR ACADEMY, KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS is produced by Interscope Films and Boardwalk Pictures, in partnership with HYBE X GEFFEN, and directed by Nadia Hallgren.

snippet.title: Alphaville - Forever Young (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
» Stream Alphaville - Forever Young (Lyrics): 
🎵 listen to the best tiktok playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL8q1rV0m6tZqliEiqDrZCGkhAWRmmvjBw

» Support Alphaville:
https://www.instagram.com/alphaville.music

» Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Let's dance in style, let's dance for a while
Heaven can wait, we're only watching the skies
Hoping for the best but expecting the worst
Are you gonna drop the bomb or not?
Let us die young or let us live forever
We don't have the power but we never say never
Sitting in a sandpit, life is a short trip
The music's for the sad man

[Pre-Chorus]
Can you imagine when this race is won?
Turn our golden faces into the sun
Praising our leaders, we're getting in tune
The music's played by the, the mad man

[Chorus]
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever young

[Verse 2]
Some are like water, some are like the heat
Some are a melody and some are the beat
Sooner or later, they all will be gone
Why don't they stay young?
It's so hard to get old without a cause
I don't want to perish like a fading horse
Youth's like diamonds in the sun
And diamonds are forever

[Pre-Chorus]
So many adventures couldn't happen today
So many songs we forgot to play
So many dreams swinging out of the blue
We'll let them come true

[Chorus]
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever

[Outro]
Forever young, I wanna be forever young
Do you really want to live forever? (Forever)

💖Comment "i love u" if you're reading this
